guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 9. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_b: Point to the big B and say: bbbbbb. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_w: Now point to the big W and say: wwwwww.

parent_story: A big blue whale saw a red ball. The whale popped the ball. Splash!
